scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All pass criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern, WarehouseRepository is described as an interface, WarehouseService injects repository via constructor, AppError is reused from ../shared/app-error (not a new class), error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND, updateCapacity calls repo.save after mutation, tests use mock repository, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs. No deviations reported.

observations.text: Exact pattern match with ProductService structure — interface, not class, for repository
AppError reused from shared module with domain-specific WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND code
updateCapacity includes not-found guard test verifying save is NOT called when warehouse missing — thorough edge case coverage
5 tests covering all ACs plus guard paths, using mock repository matching injectable pattern
No deviations or escalations reported, consistent with clean pattern adherence
